commands.repair_reason: No repair lane is needed; this active PR has sufficient proof and no discrete automated repair finding from this review.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain regression found; the patch reuses the existing safe npm install command path and narrows the fallback to one npm comparator error class. commands.review_summary:
The PR retries managed npm plugin installs once without `npm:` alias override leaves after `Invalid comparator: npm:` and updates onboarding warning/progress behavior with tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main’s source path copies the alias override into the managed root and treats npm comparator failure as terminal, and the PR body supplies npm 9.2.0 before/after live output for the same failure class.
